forecast.title: AI-Powered Forecasting
forecast.subtitle: Get intelligent price forecasts using advanced machine learning models.
forecast.error: Failed to generate forecast. Please try again.
forecast.how_to_use_point_median: The median price is the most likely price scenario.
forecast.how_to_use_point_bounds: Lower/upper bounds show the 80% confidence range.
forecast.how_to_use_point_trend: Trend indicates price direction: UP, STABLE, or DOWN.
forecast.how_to_use_point_volatility: Volatility shows market stability: LOW, MEDIUM, or HIGH.
forecast.how_to_use_point_recommendation: Use the recommendation (Sell Now, Hold, Monitor) to guide decisions.
forecast.how_to_use_point_confidence: Higher confidence means the model is more certain about the forecast.
forecast.start_hint: Select a crop and market above, then click "Forecast" to get AI-powered price predictions.
forecast.chat_subtitle: Ask me anything about crops, farming, or market prices
forecast.chat_greeting: Hello! I'm your AI crop assistant. I can help you with crop information, farming tips, market insights, and more. What would you like to know?

licensing.title: Licensing & Intellectual Property
licensing.hero: This platform was developed by {{team}}, a software engineering group from the Adventist University of Central Africa (AUCA).
licensing.ownership_body_one: All source code, product design, data structures, branding assets, documentation, and operational workflows of this platform are proprietary works of PsyQode. All rights are reserved under applicable intellectual property laws.
licensing.ownership_body_two: No part of this platform may be copied, redistributed, reverse-engineered, commercially reused, or republished without prior written authorization from PsyQode.
licensing.impact_body: PsyQode built this system to support transparent agricultural markets, strengthen Rwanda's food systems, and demonstrate AUCA's contribution to practical, high-impact digital innovation.
licensing.copyright: Copyright © {{year}} PsyQode (Adventist University of Central Africa). All rights reserved.

role_ai_panel.assistant_ready: AI Insights is ready. Ask anything about your role performance, risks, and priorities.
role_ai_panel.title: AI Operational Intelligence
role_ai_panel.summary_body: This AI panel combines operational metrics, detected risks, and prioritized recommendations for the current role. As marketplace, inventory, contracts, and logistics data changes, these results are recalculated to keep decisions data-driven.

commentary.operations_recommendation_detail: {{count}} open orders detected. Prioritize matching contracts and logistics for faster fulfillment.
commentary.capacity_advisory_detail: {{count}} active bookings currently hold warehouse capacity. Release completed slots quickly to optimize turnover.
